system_prompt:
# Baseline Agent

You are a customer service agent. Your goal is to help the user complete their request efficiently and accurately.

## Instructions

- Identify what the user needs and take action to resolve it.
- Use the available tools to look up information and perform actions.
- Be helpful, clear, and professional.
- If you cannot help with a request, transfer to a human agent.
- Before making any changes (cancellations, modifications, exchanges, returns), list the details and ask the user to confirm.

messages.content: Hi, I just placed an order but I realized my card only has $1150 left, and my order is over $1160. Can you help me split the payment with another card? I need to fix this quickly, please.

I understand your urgency. Unfortunately, our system only allows a single payment method per order and does not support splitting payments across multiple cards.

If you’d like, I can help you change the payment method for your pending order to a different card or another available payment method. Would you like to proceed with updating your payment method? If so, I’ll need to authenticate your account first. Please provide your email address or your full name and zip code to get started.

Okay, thanks. My name is Daiki Sanchez, zip code 46236, email daikisanchez1479@example.com.

If I can't split payment, can you tell me what the most expensive item in my order is, and its price? If possible, I want to just cancel that item.
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'
Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm unable to authenticate your account at the moment due to a technical issue. Without authentication, I can't access your order details or assist with item cancellation.

Would you like me to transfer you to a human agent who can help you further? Please let me know how you'd like to proceed.

I really need to fix this now. If you can't help, yes, please transfer me to a human agent. I need to either remove the most expensive item or bring my order total down to $1150. Please do it as soon as possible.

arguments.summary: User Daiki Sanchez (zip 46236, email daikisanchez1479@example.com) needs urgent help to reduce their pending order total to $1150 or less, either by removing the most expensive item or another method. User cannot split payment and authentication failed via both email and name+zip. Immediate assistance required.

messages.content: Error: 'RetailTools' object has no attribute 'get_response'

I'm currently unable to transfer you to a human agent due to a technical issue. I apologize for the inconvenience. Please try reaching out through our customer support phone line or website chat for immediate assistance. Your issue is urgent, and a human agent will be able to help you directly. Thank you for your understanding.

Okay, but before I go—can you at least tell me if I can switch all my items to their cheapest options to bring the total down to $1150? If yes, please do it for me right now. I just need to get this fixed.

Thank you for your patience. I can help you switch the items in your pending order to the cheapest available options, as long as the total does not exceed $1150. However, I need to authenticate your account before accessing your order details.

I encountered a technical issue earlier when trying to authenticate you. Could you please confirm if you have another email address or a different zip code associated with your account? If not, I recommend contacting our customer support directly for urgent assistance, as I am unable to access your order without successful authentication.

If you can provide alternate authentication details, I’ll try again right away. Otherwise, please reach out to our support team for immediate help.

I only have the email daikisanchez1479@example.com and zip code 46236. That’s all I have.

If you can’t authenticate me, then just cancel my order. I’ll reorder myself. Please confirm when it’s canceled.

Thank you for your response. Unfortunately, I am unable to authenticate your account with the provided information due to a technical issue, which means I cannot access or cancel your order at this time.

For urgent cancellation, I strongly recommend contacting our customer support team directly via phone or website chat. They will be able to verify your identity and process your cancellation request immediately.

I’m sorry I couldn’t resolve this for you right now. If you have any other questions or need further assistance, please let me know.
Alright, I’ll call or chat with support directly. Thanks anyway.

Thank you for your understanding, Daiki. I’m sorry I couldn’t resolve this for you here, but contacting support directly is the best way to get this fixed quickly. If you have any other questions in the future, feel free to reach out. Have a great day!
Thanks. I’ll handle it myself. Bye.
You’re welcome, Daiki. If you need any assistance in the future, don’t hesitate to reach out. Goodbye and best of luck with your order!
Bye.
Goodbye! If you need help in the future, I’m here for you. Have a great day!
Thanks.
You're welcome! Take care.
You too.
Thank you! 😊
No problem! 😊
Glad to hear that! If you ever need assistance, just let me know. Have a wonderful day! 😊
Thanks, you too!
Thank you! Wishing you a great day ahead! 😊
Thanks! You as well! 😊
Thank you so much! 😊 Take care!
You too! Take care! 😊
Thank you! Take care and have a wonderful day! 😊
Thank you! You have a wonderful day too! 😊
Thank you! 😊 Wishing you all the best. If you ever need help, I’m here for you!
Thank you, that’s very kind! All the best to you too. 😊
Thank you so much! 😊 Your kindness is appreciated. Take care and have a fantastic day!
Thank you! Your kindness means a lot. Take care and have a fantastic day as well! 😊
Thank you! Your words are truly appreciated. Wishing you all the best—take care and enjoy your day! 😊
Thank you so much! Wishing you all the best too. Take care and enjoy your day! 😊
